untranslatable_reason: Signal requires subjective 'conviction test' (trader psychology/confirmation) and bullish divergence detection (comparing current price lows vs. market lows across multiple timeframes). These cannot be expressed with available indicators. Swing low tracking and divergence logic require custom logic outside the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated core technical components: (1) Price above 20-period MA using sma_20 and close; (2) Used price_pos_20 as proxy for swing low alignment (position within 20-bar range); (3) Exit on MA crossover as trend reversal. The subjective conviction threshold and bullish divergence validation cannot be systematically expressed in this rule engine and require human decision-making or custom divergence detection logic.
